title: Trump threatens Iran with a new deadline: What we know about the war, now in its 6th week | CNN
text:
Source: CNN

It’s been an eventful weekend, as the US-Israel war with Iran stretches into a sixth week. US President Donald Trump has once again issued an ultimatum for Tehran, after a successful high-stakes mission to rescue a US service member stranded in Iran after his jet was shot down.

Meanwhile, strikes continue, the humanitarian crisis grows, and the global economy remains volatile. Here’s the latest.

See Full Web Article
